mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCOTT.reports ( reporter_account_id, target_account_id, target_type, target_id, content, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{reporterAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetAccountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, SYSDATE )
